center.name: Leigh, New Zealand
center.summary: Leigh, New Zealand是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括笑翠鳥，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Thomson | year=1922 | title=The Naturalisation of Animals and Plants in New Zealand | publisher=Cambridge University Press | place=Cambridge | pages=137–138 | url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/page/21725433 }} It now breeds in a small region on the western side of the Hauraki Gulf between Leigh and Kumeu. The usual habitat is open sclerophyll forest and woodland
